channel.title: Posts on My New Hugo Project
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My New Hugo Project

item.title: Devlog 01
item.description:
Camera System

Ive created a janky (but fucntioning) camera system with shutter speed, aperture, zoom and a focus button. You can snap a picutre and the game will auto generate a folder for your pics! It also displays the current focal lentgh on your screen! Take a look.

Ill be working on improving the sytem. I plan to add working ISO and motion blur depending on shtter speed. I will also bring them onto the UI as well.
